# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
// Assuming you have PDO connection setup
$pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database', 'username', 'password');

// Initialize variables
$whereClause = [];
$params = [];

if (!empty($_POST['status'])) {
    $whereClause[] = '(status = :status)';
    $params[':status'] = $_POST['status'];
}

if (!empty($_POST['category'])) {
    $whereClause[] = '(category = :category)';
    $params[':category'] = $_POST['category'];
}

if (!empty($_POST['startDate']) && !empty($_POST['endDate'])) {
    $whereClause[] = 'date BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate';
    $params[':startDate'] = $_POST['startDate'];
    $params[':endDate'] = $_POST['endDate'];
}

$whereSql = implode(' AND ', $whereClause);

$sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
if (!empty($whereSql)) {
    $sql .= ' AND ' . $whereSql;
}

$stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
$stmt->execute($params);

$reports = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

// Display the reports
foreach ($reports as $report) {
    echo htmlspecialchars($report['column_name']) . "<br>";
}
?>
